{{Infobox character
| name = Gryth
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|see everything in a person's void space and pocket}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|officer}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Import Processing}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|officer}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Waybound (novel)|Waybound]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Gryth is an individual residing on [[Kareia]], a planet within the [[United Worlds]]. He appears to hold a professional role involving investigation or enforcement, as he possesses the ability to perceive contents within a person's [[void]] space and pockets. During an encounter with [[Lindon]], Gryth attempts to maintain a professional demeanor while questioning the origins of certain items. Although he initially tries to resolve situations through reason and negotiation, his attitude can shift toward a more stern or cold warning if met with resistance. He expresses significant concern regarding the presence of [[Silverlords]], noting that they are impossible to combat and suggesting that cooperation is the only way to ensure survival.}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Gryth is a gray-haired officer serving within [[Import Processing]]. He possesses the unique ability to see everything contained within an individual's pocket and [[void]] space. During his encounter with [[Lindon]], the man found himself trapped within the protagonist's grip.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Gryth]] is a gray-haired man with a gleaming left eye.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36">''Waybound'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Gryth]]'s name is [[Gryth]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Gryth]] is an officer of [[Import Processing]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Gryth]] can see everything in a person's [[void]] space and pocket.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Gryth]] was stuck in [[Lindon]]'s grip.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“Orthos introduced you three. Gryth is my name. Gratitude.”<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
